description: InfluxData develops InfluxDB, a time series database platform for collecting, storing, querying, and analyzing time-stamped data in cloud and self-managed deployments. Its product family includes InfluxDB 2 and InfluxDB 3 variants for OSS, enterprise, and cloud use cases.
summary: InfluxData exposes a documented InfluxDB 2 OSS HTTP API, an Influx documentation MCP server, and two CLIs (`influx` and `influxdb3`); the main developer auth mechanism is an InfluxDB API token.
